div1.entryFree:
Composure, 1) the materials or ingredients of which something consists: thou art of sweet c. Troil. II, 3, 251. his c. must be rare indeed whom these things cannot blemish, Ant. I, 4, 22.
2) combination, bond: it was a strong c. a fool could disunite, Troil. II, 3, 109 (Ff counsel).
